mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_DOCUMENT_MASTER ( DOC_ID, DRAFT_TIME, DRAFTER_DEPT, APPROVAL_FORM_ID, SECURITY_LEVEL, PRESERVE_YEAR, ROOT_DOC_ID, VERSION, DRAFTER_ID, DRAFTER_NAME, APPROVAL_FORM_TITLE ) VALUES ( #{docId}, NOW(), #{drafterDept}, #{approvalFormId}, #{securityLevel}, #{preserveYear}, #{rootDocId}, #{version}, #{drafterId}, #{drafterName}, #{approvalFormTitle} )

INSERT INTO TBL_ACTIVEDOC ( DOC_ID, ATTACH_YN, URGENT_YN, LAST_MOD_DATE, DOC_TITLE, SEARCH_CONTENT, FILE_PATH, FILE_NAME, CONTENT_TYPE ) VALUES ( #{docId}, #{attachYn}, #{urgentYn}, NOW(), #{docTitle}, #{docContent}, #{filePath}, #{fileName}, #{contentType} )

INSERT INTO TBL_STATUS_MAP ( DOC_ID, DOC_STATUS, CURR_STEP, CURR_APPROVER, UPDATE_DATE, DOC_TITLE, DRAFTER, DRAFTER_DEPT, CURR_APPROVER_NAME, CURR_APPROVER_DEPT, CURR_APPROVER_DEPT_ID ) VALUES ( #{dto.docId}, #{docStatus}, #{next.stepSeq}, #{next.approverId}, NOW(), #{dto.docTitle}, #{dto.drafterId}, #{dto.drafterDept}, #{next.approverName}, #{next.approverDeptName}, #{next.approverDeptId} )

INSERT INTO TBL_APRLINE ( STEP_SEQ, DOC_ID, APPROVER_ID, APPROVER_NAME, APPROVER_JOB, APPROVE_TYPE, APPROVER_DEPT_ID, APPROVER_DEPT_NAME, APPROVE_STATUS, APPROVE_REASON, APPROVE_DATE ) VALUES
( #{item.stepSeq}, #{docId}, #{item.approverId}, #{item.approverName}, #{item.approverJob}, #{item.approveType}, #{item.approverDeptId}, #{item.approverDeptName},
'03' '02' '01' , NULL,
NOW() NULL
)
mapper.select: SELECT DOC_ID, DOC_STATUS, CURR_STEP, CURR_APPROVER, UPDATE_DATE, DOC_TITLE, DRAFTER, DRAFTER_DEPT, CURR_APPROVER_NAME, CURR_APPROVER_DEPT, CURR_APPROVER_DEPT_ID FROM TBL_STATUS_MAP WHERE DOC_ID = #{docId} FOR UPDATE

SELECT STEP_SEQ, DOC_ID, APPROVER_ID, APPROVER_NAME, APPROVER_JOB, APPROVER_DEPT_ID, APPROVER_DEPT_NAME, APPROVE_TYPE, APPROVE_STATUS FROM TBL_APRLINE WHERE DOC_ID = #{dto.docId}
AND APPROVER_ID = #{dto.processorId} AND APPROVE_STATUS = '02'
AND STEP_SEQ > ( SELECT STEP_SEQ FROM TBL_APRLINE WHERE DOC_ID = #{dto.docId} AND APPROVER_ID = #{dto.processorId} ) AND APPROVE_STATUS = '01' AND APPROVE_TYPE <> '09'
ORDER BY STEP_SEQ ASC LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE TBL_STATUS_MAP SET DOC_STATUS = #{docStatus}, UPDATE_DATE = NOW(), CURR_STEP = #{dto.currApprover.stepSeq}, CURR_APPROVER = #{dto.currApprover.approverId}, CURR_APPROVER_NAME = #{dto.currApprover.approverName}, CURR_APPROVER_DEPT_ID = #{dto.currApprover.approverDeptId}, CURR_APPROVER_DEPT = #{dto.currApprover.approverDeptName} WHERE DOC_ID = #{dto.docId}
UPDATE TBL_APRLINE SET APPROVE_STATUS = '03', APPROVE_DATE = NOW() WHERE DOC_ID = #{docId} AND APPROVER_ID = #{processorId} AND APPROVE_STATUS = '02'
UPDATE TBL_ACTIVEDOC SET LAST_MOD_DATE = NOW() WHERE DOC_ID = #{docId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_ENDDOC ( DOC_ID, COMPLETED_DATE, ARCHIVE_DATE, ATTACH_YN, URGENT_YN, DOC_TITLE, SEARCH_CONTENT, FILE_PATH, FILE_NAME, CONTENT_TYPE ) SELECT DOC_ID, NOW(), NULL, ATTACH_YN, URGENT_YN, DOC_TITLE, SEARCH_CONTENT, FILE_PATH, FILE_NAME, CONTENT_TYPE FROM TBL_ACTIVEDOC WHERE DOC_ID = #{docId}

INSERT INTO TBL_ENDAPRLINE ( DOC_ID, STEP_SEQ, APPROVER_ID, APPROVE_TYPE, APPROVE_STATUS, APPROVE_REASON, APPROVE_DATE, APPROVER_NAME, APPROVER_JOB, APPROVER_DEPT_ID, APPROVER_DEPT_NAME ) SELECT DOC_ID, STEP_SEQ, APPROVER_ID, APPROVE_TYPE, APPROVE_STATUS, APPROVE_REASON, APPROVE_DATE, APPROVER_NAME, APPROVER_JOB, APPROVER_DEPT_ID, APPROVER_DEPT_NAME FROM TBL_APRLINE WHERE DOC_ID = #{docId}
mapper.select: SELECT M.DOC_ID, M.DRAFTER_NAME, M.DRAFTER_ID, M.DRAFT_TIME, S.DOC_TITLE, S.DOC_STATUS, S.CURR_APPROVER, A.SEARCH_CONTENT AS CONTENT, L.STEP_SEQ, L.APPROVER_ID, L.APPROVER_NAME, L.DOC_ID, L.APPROVER_JOB, L.APPROVE_TYPE, L.APPROVE_REASON, L.APPROVE_DATE, L.APPROVER_DEPT_ID, L.APPROVER_DEPT_NAME, L.APPROVE_STATUS FROM TBL_DOCUMENT_MASTER M JOIN TBL_STATUS_MAP S ON M.DOC_ID = S.DOC_ID JOIN TBL_ACTIVEDOC A ON M.DOC_ID = A.DOC_ID LEFT JOIN TBL_APRLINE L ON M.DOC_ID = L.DOC_ID WHERE M.DOC_ID = #{docId} ORDER BY L.STEP_SEQ ASC

SELECT M.DOC_ID, M.DRAFTER_NAME, M.DRAFTER_ID, M.DRAFT_TIME, S.DOC_TITLE, S.DOC_STATUS, S.CURR_APPROVER, E.SEARCH_CONTENT AS CONTENT, L.STEP_SEQ, L.APPROVER_ID, L.APPROVER_NAME, L.DOC_ID, L.APPROVER_JOB, L.APPROVE_TYPE, L.APPROVE_REASON, L.APPROVE_DATE, L.APPROVER_DEPT_ID, L.APPROVER_DEPT_NAME, L.APPROVE_STATUS FROM TBL_DOCUMENT_MASTER M JOIN TBL_STATUS_MAP S ON M.DOC_ID = S.DOC_ID JOIN TBL_ENDDOC E ON M.DOC_ID = E.DOC_ID LEFT JOIN TBL_APRLINE L ON M.DOC_ID = L.DOC_ID WHERE M.DOC_ID = #{docId} ORDER BY L.STEP_SEQ ASC
